problem_statement: Implement synchronous compile-time evaluation for `comptime` blocks in the Civet compiler: evaluate blocks at compile time in an isolated realm, JSON-serialize the result (acyclic, JSON-serializable), and splice into output. No outer scope; sync only. Fix `replaceNode` premature return and parent handling. Fix Predicate typing in pattern matching when the first argument is not a typed pattern. Wire through parser, traversal, CLI, playground, and unplugin as in upstream #1180. First commit: feature only; tests in a separate commit.
problem_statement_variant: Add compile-time blocks that run while compiling and embed results in emitted code; fix tree-rewrite bugs and pattern guard typing in the same area.
hints: New: source/parser/comptime.civet, source/parser/helper.civet. Touch: source/parser.hera, source/parser/block.civet, source/parser/declaration.civet, source/parser/function.civet, source/parser/lib.civet, source/parser/pattern-matching.civet, source/parser/traversal.civet, source/parser/types.civet, source/parser/util.civet, source/cli.civet, source/config.civet, source/main.civet, build/esbuild.civet. F2P: test/comptime.civet, test/switch.civet (new case).
